headline: Armed Man Stormed a White House Press Dinner Checkpoint
summary: (Bloomberg) -- A man carrying a shotgun, a handgun and multiple knives charged a Secret Service checkpoint at the Washington Hilton Saturday night, wounding a federal officer and forcing President Donald Trump and members of his cabinet to flee the ballroom of the White House Correspondents’ Dinner.Most Read from BloombergThe Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash DemandGunman Detained, Trump Evacuated After Shooting at Press DinnerTrump Scraps US Trip for Iran Talks, Leaving Ceasefir
